Water Slide Rentals in Kentville NS

Nova Kingdom Rentals provides inflatable water slide rentals for summer birthdays, backyard parties, school events, and outdoor celebrations in Kentville, Nova Scotia. Wet-use inflatables include the Crown Island Combo, Crown Rush 42, and Crown Cascade. Kentville is the main commercial centre of the Annapolis Valley, serving a wide area of families, schools, and community organizations.

Nova Kingdom Rentals is based in Bridgewater, Nova Scotia. Approximately 90 km from Bridgewater. Travel quoted. Travel fee applies after the first 15 km from Bridgewater ($0.72/km). Final travel cost confirmed with your quote.

Featured Rentals

  • Crown Island Combo - Combo Inflatable, By quote, Wet-use - Tropical combo with bounce, slide, and splash/pool fun.
  • Crown Rush 42 - Large Inflatable, $450, Wet-use - Large 42ft water slide and obstacle course combo.
  • Crown Cascade - Water Slide, $319, Wet-use - Colourful water slide for splash-ready summer fun.

Best For

  • Summer birthdays
  • Backyard parties
  • School events
  • Hot-weather outdoor events

Frequently Asked Questions

Do you rent water slides in Kentville?
Yes. Nova Kingdom Rentals delivers water slide inflatables to Kentville, Nova Scotia. Approximately 90 km from Bridgewater. Travel quoted. Contact us to confirm availability and travel cost.
Do I need to supply water?
Yes. You must provide a water source, hose access, and a safe drainage area. Water should be turned off at least 1 hour before scheduled pickup.
What surface is needed for a water slide?
A level, grassy area is preferred. The setup area must be clear, safe, accessible, and properly sized. Power access is required to run the blower.
How old do kids need to be to use a water slide?
Age and height suitability depends on the unit. The Crown Island Combo splash pool is suitable for younger children. The Crown Rush 42 is better suited to older kids and teens. We will confirm age and height guidance when you request your rental.

Book a water slide in Kentville
